titleStmt.title: SII 31.119: original edition by C. A. Padmanabha Sastri and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 119. (A.R. No. B 215 of 1938.) CHIḌIPIRĀLA, KAMALAPURAM TALUK, CUDDAPAH DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab set up on the road side facing the shrine of Ankālamma.
It is dated Śaka 1480, (wrong for 1479) Pingaḷa, Āsvija śu. 3, Corresponding to September 25, Saturday, 1557 A.D.

Registers a gift of land measuring one kha three na, three puṭṭi and a Mutta, situated between the two canals at Chadpurēla by China Avubhalarāju, the son of China Avibaḷarāju and the grandson of mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Nandyīla Peda Avubhalarāja of Ātrēya gōtra, Yajuśśākha and Āpastaṁbha sutra, for maintaining the tirunāḷu in the months of Āśviyuja, Vayiśākha, Jyēshṭha, to the god Chaṁnarāya at Śrī Bhāshyapuram. The inscription refers to the numerical number 10 (rūkas ?) probably a portion of the income derived from the above gift for the maintenance of festivals (Tirumālu).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svastiśrī . jayībhyudaya śālivāhana śakava¨rṣaṁbu
lu 1480 Agunēṭi piṁggaḷa saṁvatsara Āśvīja śu 3 lu
śrīmadrājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrīvīrasa
dāsivadēva mahārāyalu vijayanagaraṁbu
na vajrasiṁhvāsanamaṁdu pridhvīsāṁrājyaṁ sēyucuṁ
nagā Aki(khi)lāṁḍakōṭi braṁhāṁḍanāyakuṁḍu dēvadēvā
ttamulaiyunna śrībhāṣyapuri ceṁnnakēśavarāyani divyaśrī
pādapadmaṁbulaku Ātrēyagōtra Āpastaṁbhasūtra ya
juśākhādhyāyulayina śrīmaṁnmahāmaṁḍalēśva
ra naṁdyela peda Avubhaḷurājagāri putrulayina cina Avubha
ḷrāju gāri komā[¨rlu] Ayina cina Avubhaḷurāju
gāru Anaṁttamulaina daṁḍḍamulu sama¨rppiṁci yicina bhū
dāna śāsanaṁ śrībhāsyupuraṁ caṁnnarāyuniki Āśvijamāsaṁ tirunā
ḷu vayiśākha māsaṁ tirunāḷaku jēṣṭhamā
saṁ tirunāḷaku 10 nu I tirunātu
nu tirupaṁnyārālu Āragiṁcēṭaṁduku nu vubhayamā 50
kunnumā sadāsivadēva mahārāyalu nāyaṁkarānaku pā
liṁcina gaṁḍikōṭasīmaku cellē cadpurēla nu ba
ttuni kālvakū mā kālvastalāluku
kha 1 na 32 puṭipada ru muttaluku sama¨rpi
ṁci yistimi . tadhātidhi puṇyakālamaṁdu trivācakaṁgā
nu śrībhāṣyapuru caṁnarāyaniki sama¨rppiṁci yicina bhū
dāna śāsanaṁ . svadattā dviguṇaṁ puṇyaṁ paradattānu
pālanaṁ paradattāpahārēṇa svadattaṁ niṣpalaṁ bhavēt .
Digital edition of SII 31.119 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
